3.issue_title: Align Maatwerk Risico Scan & FF Portal styling with Neo-Brutalisme

cycles.name: Cycle 1: Centralized Styles & Metadata Config

deliverables.description: Create shared TypeScript interfaces file metadata.ts
Update workspace vite.config.ts files for server allow rules

cycles.exit_criteria: All workspaces compile successfully and shared configuration files are present in the filesystem.

cycles.name: Cycle 2: Refactor Project Intake Scan

deliverables.description: Refactor ProjectIntakeScan.tsx to use theme CSS properties and rename terminology to Scan

cycles.exit_criteria: Intake Scan displays in Brutalist style and checklist terminology is fully replaced by Scan in all copy.

cycles.name: Cycle 3: Refactor Maatwerk Risico Scan

deliverables.description: Refactor MaatwerkRisicoScan.tsx to 4 step-by-step layout views
Implement localStorage history sync under key maatwerk_risico_scan_history
Implement FMEA-lite matrix and print layout in results view

cycles.exit_criteria: Triage stoplicht layout rewritten to 4 sequential views with printable reports and local history storage.

cycles.name: Cycle 4: Portal Realignment & Integration

deliverables.description: Refactor fysiek_fabriek_portal to Brutalist style and sort app cards by order
Refactor portal app to load cards dynamically from apps-metadata.json

cycles.exit_criteria: Portals dynamically render cards, sorting Project Intake Scan first, in warm light-mode Neo-brutalisme.
